---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---
## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Run `potaco ...`
2. ...

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include error output if any.

## Environment

- Potaco version: `potaco --version` or `potaco info --version`
- OS: (e.g., macOS 15.2, Ubuntu 24.04)
- Arch: (amd64, arm64)
- Provider: (OpenAI, Together AI, FAL, other)

## Additional context

Anything else relevant (config settings, image format, etc.).
